title: Liberty Bell Bay Pty Ltd — Regulatory action
investigation_objective: Named in ASIC media release 25-141MR (and the preceding 25-113MR) as a GFG Alliance Group company subject to Supreme Court of NSW orders over alleged failure to lodge annual financial reports across multiple years; escalated to a winding-up application per 26-041MR.
scope: Subject of Supreme Court of NSW civil proceedings over alleged failure to lodge annual reports for FY2021-FY2024, per 25-141MR/25-113MR; Reported to have failed to comply with the resulting court orders, leading ASIC to file a winding-up application (26-041MR); In an excess emissions situation under the Safeguard Mechanism as at the 1 April 2026 compliance deadline, per the Clean Energy Regulator's January-March 2026 compliance update
